title: Mazda Rx-7 Sky Overlay
description: A fabricskybox sky overlay of the well-known Mazda Rx-7 car.
body:
A fabricskybox sky overlay of the famous car the Mazda Rx-7. The sky has the car front and center with the Japanese signature red dot behind it along with some Japanese text. 

**This resource pack requires the FabricSkyBoxes mod. Without it, you will be unable to see it.**

![Mazda Rx-7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/993e16f51aa91b54fdb52c54c4e40432902d19c2_0.webp)
